test.fill_query: INSERT INTO vecs_{element_type}_{dimension} SELECT arrayMap(i -> to{element_type}(number + i), range({dimension})) AS v, arrayMap(i -> to{element_type}(number + i + 1), range({dimension})) AS w FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: WITH (SELECT v FROM vecs_{element_type}_{dimension} LIMIT 1) AS a SELECT sum(L1Distance(a, w)) FROM vecs_{element_type}_{dimension}
WITH (SELECT v FROM vecs_{element_type}_{dimension} LIMIT 1) AS a SELECT sum(L2Distance(a, w)) FROM vecs_{element_type}_{dimension}
WITH (SELECT v FROM vecs_{element_type}_{dimension} LIMIT 1) AS a SELECT sum(LinfDistance(a, w)) FROM vecs_{element_type}_{dimension}
WITH (SELECT v FROM vecs_{element_type}_{dimension} LIMIT 1) AS a SELECT sum(cosineDistance(a, w)) FROM vecs_{element_type}_{dimension}
